sitemapCoverage.notes: All 20 sitemap entries use https://www.donforbedford.com/ (production domain, with www). All 20 public pages are present and covered. robots.txt Sitemap directive matches: https://www.donforbedford.com/sitemap.xml. pages/template.html intentionally excluded as dev file. No pages missing from sitemap.

metadataQuality.notes: All 20 pages have title and meta description. Missing og:title + og:description (11 pages): pages/ideas.html, pages/photos.html, pages/issues/advocacy-government.html, pages/issues/battery-storage.html, pages/issues/bedford-hills.html, pages/issues/cell-service.html, pages/issues/consultants.html, pages/issues/energy-costs.html, pages/issues/growth-character.html, pages/issues/leaf-blower-ban.html, pages/issues/roads-infrastructure.html. Missing robots meta (13 pages): pages/ideas.html, pages/minutes.html, pages/photos.html, pages/press.html, and all 9 issue subpages. Unchanged from previous scan.

analyticsCoverage.notes: GA4 (G-G7WVQR4MTH) and Microsoft Clarity (wis1l4ilnm) both confirmed present on all 20 public pages and pages/template.html. No changes since 2026-04-28 install.

ga4Coverage.notes: Google Analytics 4 (G-G7WVQR4MTH) via gtag.js confirmed on all 21 files (20 public + template). Unchanged.

searchConsoleVerification.notes: No meta[name=google-site-verification] tag found in index.html. Google Search Console not verified. Verify www.donforbedford.com at search.google.com/search-console.

bingVerification.notes: No meta[name=msvalidate.01] found in index.html. Bing Webmaster Tools not verified. Verify at bing.com/webmasters.

microsoftClarity.notes: Microsoft Clarity (tag ID: wis1l4ilnm, clarity.ms/tag) confirmed present on all 21 files. Unchanged.

robotsNoindex.notes: robots.txt correctly disallows /admin/ and references Sitemap at https://www.donforbedford.com/sitemap.xml. admin/index.html confirmed noindex,nofollow and googlebot noindex,nofollow. All 20 public pages verified — none have accidental noindex meta tag.

canonicalTags.notes: All 20 public pages now have exactly one <link rel=canonical> pointing to https://www.donforbedford.com/. Verified via grep across all HTML files. Pages that previously lacked canonical (ideas.html, photos.html, press.html, all 9 issue subpages) now have it. pages/minutes.html canonical corrected from thebedfordbee.github.io to www.donforbedford.com. FIND-005 and FIND-015 resolved.

brokenLinks.notes: All previously broken contact links resolved. index.html FAQ answer now links to pages/don-bot.html?ask=real-don. pages/press.html three Contact Don buttons now link to don-bot.html?ask=real-don. No active hrefs to pages/contact.html remain in any public file. Template.html has a placeholder contact.html href but is a dev file (not public). links.html contact button is href='#' (intentional placeholder per inline comment). All other internal hrefs verified present. All 9 issue subpages verified to contain back-link to ../issues.html.

accessibility.notes: All 20 pages have viewport meta. All img tags have alt attributes (verified in prior scan). Single h1 per page confirmed. Nav elements have aria-label. Mobile nav toggle has aria-expanded. Remaining issue: multiple touch targets in site.css below 44px minimum — tracked separately in mobileUX.

performance.notes: 35 of 44 image assets exceed 200KB threshold — no image optimization changes since last scan. Largest: assets/img/roundtable-scene.png (2,936KB), assets/img/don-hero.png (2,382KB), assets/img/whiteboard.png (2,348KB), assets/img/social/road.png (2,717KB). Persona images (8 files) have .webp versions; social images (13 files) and hero/scene images do not. Some hero images missing explicit loading= lazy attribute. No code changes affecting performance since last scan.

mobileUX.notes: All 20 pages have viewport meta. Mobile nav functional. Touch target violations in site.css (affects all 19 main-layout pages): .nav-toggle 40x40px, .btn--subscribe min-height 40px, .footer-nav a ~33px, .footer-social a ~18px. Modal violations: .rt-modal__close 2rem=32px, .chat-req-modal__close 2rem=32px. photos.html inline: .photo-modal__nav 2.25rem=36px, .photo-modal__close 2rem=32px, .photo-modal__like-btn ~30px. No CSS changes since previous scan.

schema.notes: All 20 public pages have JSON-LD structured data. Schema @id and url fields now all reference https://www.donforbedford.com/ — updated as part of the 2026-04-28 domain normalization commit. No schema issues detected.

internalLinking.notes: All 9 issue subpages verified to contain back-link to ../issues.html. All previously broken contact.html links resolved (now route to don-bot.html?ask=real-don). Footer nav links verified across all pages. No broken internal hrefs remain in any public page.

imageAltText.notes: All img tags across all 20 public pages have alt attribute. Zero missing alt attributes found. Unchanged since 2026-04-27 fix.

llmDiscoverability.notes: llms.txt present at repo root. Canonical URL updated to https://www.donforbedford.com/ (domain mismatch resolved). Canonical pages section still lists only 7 pages — photos, press, don-bot, links, and all 9 issue subpages not included (FIND-012). Content guidance for AI systems is accurate and helpful.

securityPrivacy.notes: No HTTP (non-HTTPS) resource references found across all 20 public pages. External scripts (both HTTPS): Google Tag Manager/GA4 (googletagmanager.com), Microsoft Clarity (clarity.ms) — industry-standard analytics CDNs, no security concern. All other resources served from same origin or relative paths. Admin /admin/ disallowed in robots.txt with noindex,nofollow. No privacy/terms deductions per project policy (CFG.ignoreMissingPrivacyPolicy=true, CFG.ignoreMissingTerms=true).

campaignCompliance.notes: Candidate name Don Scott present on all 20 public pages. No paid advertising so no disclaimer requirements triggered. Campaign identified as local Bedford Town Supervisor race. Spending transparency visible on homepage.

aiTransparency.notes: pages/ai.html exists with comprehensive AI transparency content. Linked from homepage footer as 'AI Transparency'. AI section with explanation present on homepage. AI use openly disclosed across site.

spendingTransparency.notes: Spending section present on homepage. $9.99 of $49.99 cap displayed. One itemized expense: Domain Name $9.99. Accordion for expense detail confirmed present. Spending comparison bars present.

contentFreshness.notes: Site actively maintained (multiple commits 2026-04-28). Sitemap lastmod dates all 2026-04-28. pages/minutes.html episode content still appears in early population stage. No stale 2024 or prior-year dates found in public content.

findings.title: Sitemap domain mismatch — 18 of 20 URLs pointed to old GitHub Pages domain
findings.detectedCondition: RESOLVED 2026-04-28: All 20 sitemap entries now use https://www.donforbedford.com/.
findings.expectedCondition: All <loc> entries should use the production domain.

findings.title: No web analytics installed on any page
findings.detectedCondition: RESOLVED 2026-04-28: GA4 (G-G7WVQR4MTH) and Microsoft Clarity (wis1l4ilnm) confirmed on all 20 public pages.
findings.expectedCondition: At minimum one analytics platform tracking pageviews and sessions.

findings.title: Broken internal links — pages/contact.html does not exist
findings.detectedCondition: RESOLVED 2026-04-28: Verified — index.html line 747 now links to pages/don-bot.html?ask=real-don. pages/press.html lines 418, 562, 660 now link to don-bot.html?ask=real-don. assets/js/chat-modal.js updated to auto-open the Request a Chat modal when URL contains ?ask=real-don. No active hrefs to contact.html remain in any public page.
findings.expectedCondition: All internal hrefs resolve to an existing file.
findings.explanation: Resolved in commit 1dbabb0. Contact links now route to the existing Don-Bot modal flow.

findings.title: Google Search Console not verified
findings.detectedCondition: No meta[name=google-site-verification] tag found in index.html head. Confirmed unchanged — grep returned no matches.
findings.expectedCondition: google-site-verification meta tag present, enabling Google Search Console dashboard access.
findings.explanation: Without Search Console verification, the campaign cannot see which search queries drive traffic, check index coverage, submit the sitemap directly, or receive crawl error alerts. Domain is now fully normalized to www.donforbedford.com — this is the ideal time to verify.
findings.suggestedFix: Verify www.donforbedford.com in Google Search Console (free, at search.google.com/search-console). Choose HTML tag method — add the provided <meta name=google-site-verification content=...> to index.html <head>. Then submit sitemap at https://www.donforbedford.com/sitemap.xml.

findings.title: Missing canonical tags on 12 pages; wrong domain canonical on minutes.html; all existing canonicals used stale domain
findings.detectedCondition: RESOLVED 2026-04-28: All 20 public pages now have exactly one <link rel=canonical> pointing to https://www.donforbedford.com/. Verified via grep — 20 matches, all correct. pages/minutes.html canonical corrected. 12 pages that had no canonical now have it.
findings.expectedCondition: Every public page has a canonical tag pointing to its correct https://www.donforbedford.com/ URL.

findings.title: Missing og:title and og:description on 11 pages
findings.affectedPage: pages/ideas.html, pages/photos.html, pages/issues/advocacy-government.html, pages/issues/battery-storage.html, pages/issues/bedford-hills.html, pages/issues/cell-service.html, pages/issues/consultants.html, pages/issues/energy-costs.html, pages/issues/growth-character.html, pages/issues/leaf-blower-ban.html, pages/issues/roads-infrastructure.html
findings.detectedCondition: 11 pages missing og:title and og:description. Verified by grep for og:title across all HTML files — same 11 pages as previous scan. Unchanged.
findings.expectedCondition: All public pages have og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url for correct social media preview cards.
findings.explanation: When these URLs are shared on social platforms, they show no preview card or a generic fallback — reducing click-through rates from social sharing.
findings.suggestedFix: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, and og:url to all 11 pages. For issue subpages, use the page title and meta description as og equivalents, og:url matching the canonical, og:image the campaign default og-image.png. This can be added as a short 6-tag block in each page <head>.

findings.title: Large unoptimized PNG images without WebP alternatives
findings.affectedPage: assets/img/ (35 of 44 images exceed 200KB; social/ and hero/scene images have no .webp version)
findings.detectedCondition: 35 image files exceed 200KB. Largest: roundtable-scene.png (2,936KB), don-hero.png (2,382KB), whiteboard.png (2,348KB), social/road.png (2,717KB). Only persona images (8 files) have .webp versions. Social images (13 files) and all hero/scene images have no .webp equivalents. No image optimization commits since initial site launch.
findings.expectedCondition: Images served in modern format (WebP/AVIF) at appropriate resolution. Below-fold images lazy-loaded.
findings.explanation: Large PNGs significantly slow page load on mobile. The photo gallery loads 12 images from social/ directory — all 2MB+ PNGs — even at small grid display sizes.
findings.suggestedFix: Generate .webp versions for all social/ and hero images (free: squoosh.app or cwebp CLI). Update img tags to use <picture> element with webp source. Add loading=lazy to below-fold images. Priority: pages/photos.html and pages/issues.html.

findings.title: Multiple touch targets below 44px minimum — sitewide
findings.affectedPage: assets/css/site.css (affects all 19 pages using shared site header and footer)
findings.detectedCondition: Verified in CSS: .nav-toggle height=40px, .btn--subscribe min-height=40px, .footer-nav a computed height ~33px (padding-block: 0.3rem), .footer-social a ~18px (18px SVG, no padding). Modal violations: .rt-modal__close 2rem=32px, .chat-req-modal__close 2rem=32px. photos.html inline: .photo-modal__nav 2.25rem=36px, .photo-modal__close 2rem=32px, .photo-modal__like-btn ~30px. No CSS changes since previous scan.
findings.expectedCondition: All interactive touch targets at minimum 44×44 CSS pixels per WCAG 2.5.5.
findings.explanation: Small tap targets cause accidental taps and usability frustration on mobile. Hamburger menu (40px), subscribe CTA (40px), and footer social icons (~18px) are most impactful for visitors.
findings.suggestedFix: In site.css: .nav-toggle → min-width/min-height: 44px; .btn--subscribe → min-height: 44px; .footer-nav a → padding-block: 0.5rem; .footer-social a → min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; .rt-modal__close and .chat-req-modal__close → 2.75rem. In photos.html: .photo-modal__nav, .photo-modal__close → 2.75rem; .photo-modal__like-btn → min 44px.

findings.title: Microsoft Clarity not installed
findings.detectedCondition: RESOLVED 2026-04-28: Clarity (wis1l4ilnm) confirmed on all 20 public pages.
findings.expectedCondition: Clarity installed for session recordings and heatmaps.

findings.title: Bing Webmaster Tools not verified
findings.detectedCondition: No meta[name=msvalidate.01] found in index.html. Confirmed unchanged — grep returned no matches.
findings.explanation: Bing powers DuckDuckGo, Yahoo, and other search engines. Verification enables Bing Search Console for index monitoring and sitemap submission.
findings.suggestedFix: Verify www.donforbedford.com at bing.com/webmasters (free). Add <meta name=msvalidate.01 content=...> to index.html <head>.

findings.title: 13 pages missing robots meta tag
findings.affectedPage: pages/ideas.html, pages/minutes.html, pages/photos.html, pages/press.html, pages/issues/advocacy-government.html, pages/issues/battery-storage.html, pages/issues/bedford-hills.html, pages/issues/cell-service.html, pages/issues/consultants.html, pages/issues/energy-costs.html, pages/issues/growth-character.html, pages/issues/leaf-blower-ban.html, pages/issues/roads-infrastructure.html
findings.detectedCondition: Grep for meta[name=robots] across all HTML found 7 public pages with robots meta (index.html, links.html, pages/ai.html, pages/don-bot.html, pages/issues.html, pages/odds.html, pages/rules.html). 13 public pages have no robots meta. Unchanged from previous scan.
findings.expectedCondition: Explicit <meta name=robots content='index, follow, max-image-preview:large'> on all public pages.
findings.explanation: Without explicit robots meta, crawlers cannot receive the max-image-preview:large directive which enables richer image previews in Google Search results.
findings.suggestedFix: Add <meta name=robots content="index, follow, max-image-preview:large"> to the 13 affected pages. Pair with FIND-006 resolution for a single consolidated head cleanup pass.

findings.title: llms.txt canonical pages list incomplete — 13 of 20 pages not listed
findings.detectedCondition: llms.txt Canonical Pages section lists 7 of 20 pages (Homepage, Rules, Issues, Ideas, Minutes, AI Transparency, Odds). Not listed: links.html, photos.html, press.html, don-bot.html, and all 9 issue subpages. Canonical URL now correctly uses https://www.donforbedford.com/ (domain mismatch from prior scan resolved). Page coverage gap unchanged.
findings.expectedCondition: llms.txt Canonical Pages covers all public sections of the site so AI agents can discover all content.
findings.explanation: AI agents and LLMs using llms.txt for site discovery will not find the Don-Bot, Press, Photos, Links, or any of the 9 issue deep-dive pages.
findings.suggestedFix: Add entries for links.html, pages/photos.html, pages/press.html, pages/don-bot.html, and all 9 pages/issues/*.html to the Canonical Pages section in llms.txt.

findings.title: Image alt text fixed — resolved
findings.detectedCondition: All img tags verified to have alt attribute. Confirmed unchanged.
findings.expectedCondition: All img tags have meaningful, descriptive alt attributes.

findings.title: Schema markup added to all pages — resolved
findings.detectedCondition: All 20 public pages confirmed to have JSON-LD. Schema URLs now reference https://www.donforbedford.com/ — updated in domain normalization commit 1dbabb0.
findings.expectedCondition: Appropriate JSON-LD on every page with correct production domain URLs.

findings.title: Domain transition incomplete — sitemap/robots.txt used donforbedford.com but HTML canonicals, schema, and llms.txt referenced uncampaign.pages.dev
findings.affectedPage: all 20 public HTML pages, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt
findings.detectedCondition: RESOLVED 2026-04-28: All public HTML files now have canonicals, og:url, twitter:url, og:image, and JSON-LD schema URLs pointing to https://www.donforbedford.com/. Sitemap and robots.txt also use www.donforbedford.com. llms.txt canonical URL updated. Confirmed via full grep scan — zero uncampaign.pages.dev or thebedfordbee.github.io references remain in any public file.
findings.expectedCondition: All canonical tags, schema URLs, and llms.txt reference https://www.donforbedford.com/ consistently.
findings.explanation: Resolved in commit 1dbabb0. Full domain normalization complete.

scanHistory.note: Initial stub scan — estimated data, no file reads performed

First real full scan — all 20 public pages read and verified. Score matches stub numerically but reflects accurate findings. Improvements confirmed: all schema added, all alt text fixed, llms.txt verified. Key drags: sitemap domain mismatch on 18/20 URLs, no analytics on any page, 12 pages missing canonical, 5 broken contact links.

Score improved +17 (59→76). Resolved: GA4 on all 20 pages, Microsoft Clarity on all 20 pages, sitemap GitHub Pages domain mismatch. New finding FIND-015: domain transition incomplete — sitemap/robots.txt updated to donforbedford.com but HTML canonicals, schema, llms.txt still referenced uncampaign.pages.dev.

Score improved +6 (76→82). Resolved: all 20 pages now have canonical tags on www.donforbedford.com (FIND-005), all broken contact links routed to Don-Bot modal via ?ask=real-don (FIND-003), full domain normalization complete across all HTML/schema/llms.txt/sitemap (FIND-015). Remaining critical: Google Search Console not verified. Remaining important: og:title missing on 11 pages, large images unoptimized, touch targets below 44px.
